text:
> >Severity:       critical

noncritical

> >Class:          sw-bug

ports in real world...

> When I lock the screen from KDE, I can't log back in!  It seems, KDE doesn't recognize my password.
> The only way to log back in to KDE is to shut down the computer and turn in back on!
> But then all my unsaved works are lost!  

KDE 1.X

Problem exist. Incorrect auth/pam use?

Try to use Ctrl-Shift-Backspace to shutdown X as a temporary
solution or Ctrl-Shift-F? onto different virtual console and kill KDE lock
process.

Bye!
Serg N. Voronkov
